title: Allocate 5-minute slots with a 3-minute gap between successive slots
description: The system shall allocate time slots that are exactly 5 minutes long with a 3-minute gap inserted after each slot before the next slot begins.
rationale: This requirement ensures there is adequate buffer time between appointments, improving patient or customer experience and reducing operational stress.
business_value: Improves efficiency and satisfaction by providing sufficient time for patients or customers to transition between appointments without feeling rushed.

source.description: As a scheduler, I need to allocate 5-minute slots with a 3-minute gap between successive slots so that there is adequate buffer time between appointments.

acceptance_criteria: There is a 3-minute gap between the end of one slot and the start of the next
postconditions: Time slots are created with the specified duration and gap
The scheduling system operates without errors related to slot allocation
functional_constraints: Slot duration must be exactly 5 minutes
Gap between slots must be exactly 3 minutes

non_functional_requirements.usability: Error handling for invalid slot configurations, clear display of available slots

edge_cases: What happens if a user tries to create overlapping slots?
How should the system handle requests for slot durations other than 5 minutes?
What is the behavior when there are no available time slots between the end of one slot and the start of the next?

interfaces.name: Scheduling Database
interfaces.description: The system interacts with a database to store and retrieve time slot information.

interfaces.name: Scheduling API
interfaces.description: The requirement involves creating slots through an API that can be invoked by the scheduling application or other services.

test_cases.description: Create a single slot and verify its duration.
test_cases.expected_result: A time slot of exactly 5 minutes is created without any gaps.

test_cases.description: Create multiple slots with the specified gap and verify their durations.
test_cases.expected_result: Each slot is 5 minutes long, and there is a 3-minute gap between consecutive slots.

test_cases.description: Attempt to create overlapping slots and verify error handling.
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the request and provides an appropriate error message.
